summary: Iteration 151: Tested 4 new features - (1) Renewal reminder email templates, (2) Stripe webhook billing_type=partner routing, (3) ?tenant= URL param skips gateway login step, (4) Admin store filters CRUD + storefront display. CRITICAL BUG FIXED: Store.tsx had duplicate export default function Store() (lines 280-434) causing frontend compilation failure - fixed by removing old duplicate. All 28 backend tests pass. All frontend features confirmed working.

bugs_fixed_this_iteration.bug: CRITICAL: Duplicate 'export default function Store()' declaration (lines 38 and 280). The second declaration (lines 280-434) was the old Store without configuredFilters functionality that was accidentally left in the file. This caused Babel/TS compilation errors: 'Identifier Store has already been declared' and 'TS2323: Cannot redeclare exported variable default'. Frontend was BROKEN and not building.
bugs_fixed_this_iteration.fix: Removed the duplicate old Store() function (lines 279-434). Kept only the new Store() (lines 1-277) with configuredFilters, activeFilters, toggleFilter, matchesFilter logic.

ui_bugs.issue: Dev-environment hydration warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <tbody> with a <span> wrapper'. Same dev-platform artifact as noted in iter148. Not a functional issue, renders and works correctly.
Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for DialogContent. Minor accessibility warning, not functional.

issues: 'Resource limit reached' banner still showing for bright-accounting (Admin Users: 4/3 blocked). This is expected behavior from license enforcement tests in iter149 - E1 should verify if this should be cleared or is expected.

action_items: NONE - All features working. Store.tsx duplicate function fixed by T1.
OPTIONAL: ProductEditor.tsx shows TS2741 error in historical err.log for 'default_term_months' - but current compilation succeeds (warnings only). E1 may want to verify this is resolved.
OPTIONAL: 'Resource limit reached' banner for bright-accounting admin - E1 should verify if admin user count reset is needed or is expected to remain.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Store.tsx had duplicate export default function Store() at lines 38 and 280. The second was the old version without configuredFilters. Caused full frontend compilation failure. Fixed by removing lines 279-434.

NOTE: Store.tsx Line 80 has React Hook useEffect missing dependency 'searchParams' - eslint warning only, not a build error. E1 may want to add searchParams to the dependency array or use // eslint-disable-next-line.
NOTE: SubscriptionsTab.tsx Line 145 has missing dependency 'load' in useEffect - same pattern, eslint warning only.
NOTE: Scheduler (APScheduler) starts correctly at 09:00 UTC daily. Cannot test actual email sending without triggering time-based job. MOCKED email sends go to email_outbox collection.
NOTE: Webhooks billing_type=partner routing is a code-only feature - cannot test without real Stripe webhook events. Code reviewed and logic is correct.
NOTE: The store_filters endpoints use tenant_id from get_tenant_admin - both platform admin and partner admins can manage their own filters independently (correct behavior).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 8 critical frontend scenarios verified and passing)

test_credentials.platform_admin: admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123! (login without partner_code or use automate-accounts gateway)
test_credentials.partner_admin: sarah@brightaccounting.local / ChangeMe123! (bright-accounting gateway, or ?tenant=bright-accounting URL param)

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test store filters (Price Range with Under £50/£50-£200/Over £200 options) during testing. All cleaned up via API. No persistent test data left.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features for iter151 are verified and working. CRITICAL: Store.tsx duplicate function was fixed by T1 (removed old Store function at lines 279-434). Backend: 28/28 tests at /app/backend/tests/test_iter151_new_features.py. Frontend verified: (1) ?tenant= URL param skips gateway login step showing partner branding - PASS, (2) Admin Filters tab in Commerce section with full CRUD (create/edit/toggle/delete) - PASS, (3) Storefront sidebar shows configured filters with options and counts - PASS, (4) Email templates includes subscription_renewal_reminder and partner_subscription_renewal_reminder (>= 15 total) - PASS, (5) Partner admin My Billing (My Subscriptions/My Orders) regression - PASS. APScheduler starts correctly (daily 09:00 UTC). Webhook billing_type=partner routing code reviewed (correct, cannot test without real Stripe webhooks). Email sending is MOCKED to email_outbox. Resource limit reached banner for bright-accounting is from license tests in iter149.
